extortion.description: https://www.zoominfo.com/c/pos-bilis%CC%A7im-teknolojileri/459191643 www.posbilisim.com Pos Bilişim is a leading company in the Automatic Identification and Data Collection sector in Turkey, established in 2012. They offer a wide range of products including handheld terminals, barcode readers, printers, and industrial PCs, partnering with brands like Honeywell, Zebra, and TSC. The company provides tailored solutions for various sectors such as retail, logistics, and public services, focusing on enhancing operational efficiency and performance. With a strong financial background and a dedicated team, Pos Bilişim aims to deliver high-quality products and services to its clients.
